meta.title: JP Rentals | Steel structure and cladding for industrial projects
meta.description: Design, fabrication, and installation of steel structures, roofs, and cladding for industrial buildings nationwide in Mexico. Grupo NASA.
meta.keywords: steel structure, cladding, KR-18, R101, national coverage, Mexico, industrial building, JP Rentals

contact.mailtoBody:
Hello,

I would like information on a structure or decking project.

Project or location:

Thank you.

hero.headline: Industrial steel and cladding nationwide
hero.sub: We coordinate supply, fabrication, and erection with a focus on schedule, quality, and documentation. References include warehouses, roofs, façades, and structural work across multiple plants and states.

items.title: Freight roof
items.scope: Supply, fabrication, and erection of the steel frame in the freight area; KR-18 roof deck; R101 wall panels on façade and counter-façade.
items.imageAlt: Coca-Cola Arca Continental: freight roof structure, Monterrey

items.title: Cladding (scaling & packing)
items.scope: Fabrication and erection; KR-18 roof and R101 wall panels.

items.title: CEDIS II — structure & cladding
items.location: WTC La Pila Industrial Park, San Luis Potosí
items.scope: Supply, fabrication, and erection; KR-18 roof and R101 façades.
items.imageAlt: Motomex CEDIS, San Luis Potosí: structure and roof

items.title: Multi-tenant building
items.scope: Fabrication and erection of the multi-tenant warehouse frame.

items.title: Warehouse & mezzanines
items.scope: Erection of the main building, office mezzanines, and Losacero 15 mezzanine decking.

items.title: CEDIS I — structure & cladding
items.location: WTC La Pila Industrial Park, San Luis Potosí
items.scope: Supply, fabrication, and erection; KR-18 roof and R101 façades.
items.imageAlt: Motomex CEDIS I: structure and roof

items.title: Structure
items.body: Assisted design, detailing, fabrication, and erection with QC for warehouses and industry.

items.title: Sheeting & envelope
items.body: Commercial profiles (e.g. KR-18), wall and façade R panels or as per design, closed out on site.

items.title: Strengthening & mezzanines
items.body: Work on existing buildings, mezzanines, Losacero and adjustments with minimal disruption.

cta.title: Contact
cta.intro: Direct channels for nationwide support. Headquarters in Monterrey, N.L.

footer.description: Steel structures and roof / envelope systems with nationwide execution in Mexico. Grupo NASA.

about.title: Steel and cladding at national scale
about.body1: We deliver projects with business sense, technical precision, and operational discipline. Our approach combines engineering, fabrication, and erection for high-impact work with demanding standards for quality, safety, and schedule.
about.body2: More than a contractor, we are a strategic partner for companies that need solid results on real timelines. Industrial organizations across Mexico rely on JP Rentals for critical structural projects.
about.imageAlt: JP Rentals on site for structure and cladding work

group.title: Grupo NASA
group.intro: The same standards for execution, fabrication, and quality control, with complementary capabilities across the group.
group.nasaceroBody: Specialized steel cutting: plasma, laser, oxy-fuel, and guillotine.
